commentary_text: The model favors Panama at 67%, while the market favors Ghana at 47%—a 37-percentage-point gap on the Ghana win outcome. This reversal could reflect recent lineup changes, injury updates, or shift in form that the statistical model has not yet incorporated. The market is also pricing a notably higher draw probability at 27% versus the model's 23%. The dashboard flags this as a significant structural disagreement rather than a modest recalibration, warranting attention to what on-the-ground information may have emerged since the model's last update.
